app.name: BenQ Network Projector
app.description: Control your BenQ network-enabled projector from Homey. Power on/off, switch inputs, adjust volume, monitor lamp hours with Insights, and build automations — all over your local network with no extra hardware required.

list_devices.title: Searching for BenQ projectors...
list_devices.subtitle: Make sure your projector is on and connected to the network

ip_address.label: IP Address
ip_address.hint: The IP address of your BenQ projector. Leave empty to use auto-discovery during pairing.

poll_interval.label: Status Check Interval (seconds)
poll_interval.hint: How often to check projector status (default: 2 minutes)

lamp_warning_hours.label: Lamp Warning Threshold (hours)
lamp_warning_hours.hint: Log a warning when lamp hours exceed this value. Rated life is ~3500h on Normal mode.

network_standby.label: Network Standby Mode
network_standby.hint: Enable if your projector stays reachable when off (check Projector > Standby Settings > Network). When disabled, connection timeouts are treated as the projector being off rather than an error.

eco_blank.title: ECO Blank
eco_blank.desc: Blanks the screen and reduces lamp power. Use during pauses to extend lamp life.
